content.content: The first act of the new regime is bringing William Pelley back into the country and giving him an official position.

Pelley has promised a campaign of revenge against the socialists, and the Silver Legion have already spilled much blood on the streets. In his published manifesto, he promises a campaign of unspeakable horror against our Jews, and endless wars of violent expansion that will ruin all of Europe.
What are we to do now?
The White House orders agencies to stretch every appropriation and open temporary works offices where the unemployment lines are worst. It helps, but opponents call it government by improvisation.

kellogg_briand.step_forward.title: The treaty is a step forward for peace.

content.content: Despite our misgivings about the treaty, it still represents a step forward for the cause of international peace.

The pro-labor policy is popular among workers and is bringing the SPA more support, but in response businesses are laying off more workers and reducing hours. This is setting the government up for a confrontation with the capitalists.
They do not see us as serious in trying to achieve the goals of the coalition.
Our relations are too poor.
we do not have any more time.

We argue that we are working hard to achieve the coalition's goals, and in the name of proletarian solidarity, we must make this coalition function. Surprisingly, the SPA hears our pleas, and is willing to give us six more months before the coalition goals must be achieved.
Unfortunately, we could not influence the SPA leadership election against the hardliners. Thälmann quickly moves to consolidate absolute leadership, expelling or exiling his opponents.

kpd_conference.title: SPA Party Conference
kpd_conference.subtitle: The SPA chooses its new national committee - will the corruption scandal influence their choice?

content.content: SPA Party Conference

Now is the SPA's national party conference, where they will choose their new leadership. The shadow of the Wittorf Affair hangs over it. On one hand are the hardline supporters of Thälmann, who support a "social fascist" policy that places the SPD as equivalent to the Silver Legion. On the other hand is the "Conciliator" faction, who support a more cooperative policy towards the SPD.

After our discussion with the Soviets, we are inclined to believe that Stalin is at least open to the Conciliators. In order to affect the SPA's leadership elections, we have to influence both the Comintern leaders as as well as the SPA membership.

labor_organization_pressure.afl_mediatio.title: Build an AFL mediation channel.
labor_organization_pressure.afl_mediatio.subtitle: Stabilizes labor relations; disappoints militant organizers.

content.content: The administration gives established labor leaders a privileged channel into federal mediation. It is less explosive than industrial unionism and much easier to defend in Congress.

options.title: Use our resources to reduce dissent within the coalition.

content: Appoint Thälmann as speaker instead of

options.title: Could we form a new government?
Never mind. Let the vote happen.

content.content: How do we assuage the SPA?
Even though most workers grudgingly accept the our intervention, there is deep bitterness developing against the SPD, especially among the more radical workers. The Communists stand to gain.
Even in their weakened state, the Silver Legion are still a threat. We must not be too complacent.

nazis_in_crisis.title: Silver Legion in Crisis
nazis_in_crisis.subtitle: Finally, the Silver Legion's internal contradictions have caught up to it.

options.title: This is an occasion to celebrate.
The Silver Legion are still a threat. We must not be too complacent.

content.content: Silver Legion in Crisis

Finally, the internal contradictions of the Silver Legion have caught up to it. With the improving economic conditions, many business leaders are less interested in supporting them. Tensions between their remaining big capitalist funders and their lower middle class frontliners have come to a head, leading to desertions and public spats. This all saps Pelley's aura of strength, weakening Silver Legion support across a variety of demographics.

march_on_berlin.accept.title: There is nothing we can do.

liberty_league_test_case.popular_case.title: Make the agency's beneficiaries visible.
liberty_league_test_case.popular_case.subtitle: Raises legitimacy, but politicizes the Court fight.

content.content: Relief recipients, farmers, and local officials testify in public. The case becomes harder for opponents to describe as abstract constitutional housekeeping.

nusj_silver_escalation.state_guard_respo.title: Coordinate governors, police, and the Guard.
nusj_silver_escalation.state_guard_respo.subtitle: Checks street violence; carries repression risk.

content.content: Allied governors receive quiet federal support to keep armed politics off the streets. It works best where state governments are friendly, and worst where sheriffs sympathize with the men they are supposed to contain.

content: Our vote against the battlecruiser is unpopular among the right-wing parties

content.content: , including our coalition partners
, including the minority government that we are currently supporting
The United States, like much of the world, is still inside the economic crisis. Conditions may have stopped collapsing, but that is not the same as recovery.

opposition_strategy.liberty_court_campai.title: Liberty League funds a court campaign.

content.content: The Liberty League turns legal resistance into a national fundraising machine. Every agency lawyer now expects a lawsuit.

Military leaders are upset at the Ministry's decision to not construct the battlecruiser, and they have taken the complaints to our coalition partners. However, there is not much they can do to force the construction, as we have control over the Defense Department ministry.
No matter what, the battlecruiser will not be built. We have fulfilled one of our campaign promises, and our supporters are pleased.
Panzerkreuzer

Navy leaders are asking for the construction of a new battlecruiser, as promised by the previous government. Since we control the Defense Department ministry, it is our decision as to whether to build the battlecruiser or not.
Bowing to the other parties' demands, we reduce the Democratic Defense League's military training, thus inducing them to stay.
Despite his known reactionary nature, the old president has at least been keeping the Silver Legion at bay. Thus, we must support him.

relief_office_opening.local_democrats.title: Let local Democrats staff the desks.
relief_office_opening.local_democrats.subtitle: More party strength; more patronage pressure.

content.content: County Democrats know the churches, unions, ward clubs, and courthouse habits. They also know how to turn a relief line into a party list.
After a second budget proposal, Schacht still considers Hilferding's budget to be unacceptable, despite more regressive taxes and expenditure cuts.
Even in their weakened state, the Silver Legion are still a threat. We must not be too complacent.

return_to_normalcy.title: Return to Normalcy
return_to_normalcy.subtitle: Have we finally found our way out of the crisis?

options.title: This is an occasion to celebrate.
The Silver Legion are still a threat. We must not be too complacent.

content.content: Return to Normalcy
The republic is finally moving from emergency depression politics into an uneven recovery. Unemployment is no longer at crisis levels, growth has resumed, and the political crisis begins to loosen.

Finally, the internal contradictions of the Silver Legion have caught up to it. With the improving economic conditions, many business leaders are less interested in supporting them. Tensions between their remaining big capitalist funders and their lower middle class frontliners have come to a head, leading to desertions and public spats. This all saps Pelley's aura of strength, weakening Silver Legion support across a variety of demographics.

silver_legion_rally.deny_permits.title: Push cities to deny permits.
silver_legion_rally.deny_permits.subtitle: Slows the rally circuit; civil-liberties criticism rises.

content.content: Mayors and police chiefs find every procedural reason to block the next rallies. It works, but not cleanly.

We can combat the Silver Legion by adopting a "People's Party" posture that might compete for support among the middle class. In order to do this, we can create a new and inclusive vision of the party that encompasses all people who work for a living, which is almost everyone in the country save the aristocrats and top capitalists.

This effort faces great opposition from the left and center of our party, who would prefer a party focused on the working class. To fully adopt the vision of a people's party, we should increase our campaigning among other demographics.

spa_farmer_labor_pressure.farm_labor_bar.title: Cut a Farmer-Labor farm and workplace bargain.
spa_farmer_labor_pressure.farm_labor_bar.subtitle: Farmer-Labor support improves; budget pressure and business criticism rise.

content.content: Farmer-Labor leaders secure visible rural relief, a stronger floor for collective bargaining, and enough patronage to defend the deal back home. It is expensive, but it keeps the progressive wing inside the governing orbit.
Federal mediators keep the strike wave from becoming one national confrontation. It is untidy, but it buys time.

schleichers_schemes.accept_2.title: Accept the emergency scheme.
schleichers_schemes.accept_2.subtitle: We will support the suspension of Congress.

content.content: With the exception of the trade unions, every faction of the SPD is horrified by this betrayal of democracy.
Somehow, the DNVP has agreed to the conservative operator's proposal, forming a temporary alliance with the general against Silver Legion and Communists.
The Center Party also supports the conservative operator's plan.
In addition, the DVP and some other smaller parties support this proposal.

The DNVP, despite being courted by the conservative operator, is not interested in joining this alliance. DNVP chairman Hugenberg seems to prefer working with Pelley to any alliance that includes the SPD.
This is a gift to the Communists, a boost to their theory that parliamentary democracy will never benefit the working class.
With Huey Long now positioned inside the labor wing, the conference proceeds to decide economic direction.

us_presidential_election.labor_left_fron.title: Build a labor-left front.
us_presidential_election.labor_left_fron.subtitle: Ask Farmer-Labor and the Socialist Party of America to stand down for the Democratic ticket.
us_presidential_election.labor_left_fron.unavailableSubtitle: Farmer-Labor relations must be at least 40 and Socialist Party relations at least 45.

content.content: Farmer-Labor and the socialists agree to consolidate behind the Democratic ticket. Conservatives recoil, but labor organizers are energized.
The DVP will likely break the coalition.

We have increased employer contributions to the unemployment insurance fund, allowing the program to continue without hurting workers and the unemployed. Perhaps understandably, the capitalists and their political parties are furious, while our base in the unions and among the unemployed are pleased.
The information spreads without our help, leading to some loss of SPA support among the workers.

The case progresses slowly, given the military secrets involved, and there will be no determination made for a while. The Defense Department is pleased of our loyalty. However, the affair has made the Western powers suspicious of our resurgent militarism, as well as displeasing the left wing of the party.

options.title: Give up on leadership of key states.
Use our resources to reduce dissent within the coalition.
Could we get the SPA to abstain?
Never mind. Let the vote happen.

content.content: How do we assuage our partners?

young_plan_right_coalition.vonc_no.title: Support the rump Center-led government, voting in favor of the government.
young_plan_right_coalition.vonc_no.subtitle: We would essentially provide "toleration" to a conservative government.

content: By supporting the government, we have essentially entered into a "toleration" arrangement with the
government. We do not have a voice in the government, but we are responsible for its continued stability. The left of our party opposes this plan, and would rather that we hold new elections.

We rail hard against nationalism and in favor of pacifism and belonging to the international community of nations. The referendum easily fails, with only around 15% of voters supporting it. It seems that nationalism is not omnipotent in the republic, despite everything.

content.content: We have rallied the workers to the cause of internationalism.

The message ties foreclosure relief, crop prices, and union rights together. Farmer-Labor organizers are easier to work with afterward, while business papers warn that the administration is buying votes with federal power.

weltbuhne_2.drop_case.unavailableSubtitle: We do not control the Justice Ministry.

content.content: With our control of the Justice Ministry, we are able to pardon von Ossietzky and Kreiser. This restores some of our reputation with pacifists and the international community.

confronting_nazis.economic_crisis.title: We must address the economic crisis first.

content.content: Our current members appreciate this, but no one decides to join a party because of the low dues.

crisis_program.support_labor.subtitle: Call for increased public works and fiscal stimulus.
crisis_program.support_labor.unavailableSubtitle: The Labor Democrats are not strong enough.

content.content: Attacking the far right is popular among the entire party, although the left considers the conservative parties to be just as dangerous, while the right is critical of our lack of response to the SPA. Our conservative coalition partners are also skeptical of our lack of commitment to anti-communism.

media.campaign.title: The purpose of our media is to elect more Social Democrats.
media.campaign.subtitle: Our newspapers will focus on the electoral campaign.

content: Our campaign media is mostly reaching the workers who are already saturated with Socialist propaganda, but it must be doing

content.content: something

content: , or at least that is what we hope.

content.content: - We will also help the Austrians oppose their dictatorship.

Our Democratic Defense League can learn much in paramilitary organization and training from the Austrian Republikanischer Schutzbund (Republican Protection Units), the paramilitary branch of the Austrian social democrats.
We are also helping the Austrian Social Democratic Worker's Party build up their resources in preparation for a future struggle, legally and illegally.
The communists are suspicious of our overtures, especially the Stalinist leadership, who persist in calling us "social fascists". However, connections are made at the grassroots and local levels.
The regulars promise fewer manifestos and more delivered favors. County chairs, governors, and committee men like the sound of that; ideological factions hear a machine being rebuilt around them.
The Iron Front rallies against nationalism and war.
We have promised to adopt a more reformist posture. This may alienate the left, however.
We do not need these new ideas; they seem to imitate too closely those of the Silver Legion and Communists.
Neorevisionism: A New Idea

Several young socialists, led by Carlo Mierendorff, are calling for a "new revisionism" in response to the Silver Legion threat. This political tendency calls for a mass movement in favor of democracy in order to counter the Silver Legion and Communist movements, and to update our rhetoric and imagery to appeal to emotion and not just reason.

content: We have increased funding to Workers' Welfare.

content.content: In an age of economic crisis, this will be helpful for improving our standing among the unemployed.
We develop an entire campaign against antisemitism under the auspices of the Iron Front. Hopefully our campaign can sway the workers away from Silver Legionm.

In an emergency conference, we have decided to become a people's party that encompasses all of the regular people of the republic, not just the workers and urban poor. The Left and Center claim that our new party platform is a betrayal of our founding principles, a turn away from Marxism towards conservative opportunism. Whatever the case, we are now a party representing all of the people, not just the working class.
Should we run a new campaign to publicize our new platform?
As we have already funded resources towards the Democratic Defense League, we can invest in building up their militancy.
As a people's party, we represent the employees and small businesspeople of the middle class, and they are becoming receptive to our messages.
We have increased training and purchased more armaments for the Democratic Defense League.
The Center Party decries the militarization of the Democratic Defense League, and its members are leaving the republican organization.
People

main.presidential.title: White House and Administration
main.presidential.subtitle: Executive messaging, cabinet direction, governors, courts, and national crisis management.

game_over.war_against_hitler.title: The Silver Legion is in power, but we are fighting to stop it.

content.content: Adolf Pelley has taken power in the republic. However, we have rallied the democratic forces of the country against him, and are fighting back. The outcome of this war is uncertain.
Paramilitaries
CIO Mobilization
Socialist Action Committees
American Legion Network
Silver Legion
Official military/paramilitaries
Timeline of the U.S. crisis prelude (until late 1932)

content: : Financial collapse triggers a severe depression wave. Credit contraction, business failures, and mass layoffs accelerate.
: Unemployment and social dislocation rise sharply. Traditional two-party alignment weakens as protest movements grow.
: Regional distress intensifies. Militant labor and reactionary civic formations both expand their street presence.

content.content: 1932 (early-mid)

content: : Presidential contest radicalizes political rhetoric. Coalition discipline deteriorates across major parties.

content.content: 1932 (late)

content: : The incoming administration is Democratic, but internal doctrine remains unsettled. Party conferences become decisive for strategic direction, coalition viability, and response to extremism.

: The New Deal either stabilizes the constitutional order, is narrowed into managed reaction, or leaves the republic in systemic rupture. The outcome depends on recovery, public legitimacy, constitutional stress, conservative backlash, and radical momentum.

content.content: "The only thing we have to fear is fear itself - nameless, unreasoning, unjustified terror which paralyzes needed efforts to convert retreat into advance."
- Franklin D. Roosevelt, First Inaugural Address, 1933
This is a U.S. alternate-history campaign set in a deepened Great Depression. Historical texture matters, but this is still a game: choices, tradeoffs, and divergence are the point.
For setting context, coalition backgrounds, and faction references, open the "Library" page from the sidebar.

aufhauser.crisis.title: Addressing the economic crisis
aufhauser.crisis.subtitle: Hillman can help build support for a labor-forward recovery program.

content.content: We are not currently in an economic crisis.
We have already adopted the Structural Transformation plan.

hilferding.finance_ministry_.title: Fiscal Policy
hilferding.finance_ministry_.subtitle: Tugwell can shape Treasury tax policy.

content.content: Democratic Party not in government.
The Democratic Party does not control the Treasury Department.

baade.depression.title: Addressing the economic crisis
baade.depression.subtitle: Formulate a plan to rescue us from the economic crisis.

content.content: We are not currently in an economic crisis.
We have already adopted an economic plan.
Wallace helps sell a public-works and farm-recovery program as a national rescue plan rather than a narrow factional demand.
Henry A. Wallace
Wallace is an agricultural reformer and experimental economist who sees farm recovery, conservation, and rural purchasing power as central to national recovery.
Lehman must be Speaker or President.
We have removed this power from the president with a constitutional reform.

content: We have called for new elections, set for

content.content: Herbert Lehman

Lehman is a disciplined liberal governor with deep ties to state administration, relief delivery, and cautious reformers. He is strongest when the administration needs governors and moderates to move together.
We have enforced party discipline to reduce dissent across all factions.
We have reduced tensions with the Labor Democrats, and increased their strength in the party.
William Green
Green is an AFL labor leader with deep ties to craft unions and cautious labor officials. He can steady labor relations without promising an industrial revolution.
The Democratic Party is not currently in government.
This requires the Commerce Department.
The Speaker must be a Democrat.
Pauli Murray
Murray is a civil-rights lawyer and organizer who presses the coalition to treat legal equality as part of democracy, not a luxury for calmer times.

juchacz.organizing_women.title: Organizing women
juchacz.organizing_women.subtitle: Perkins's strategies are aimed at more "traditional" women.

content.content: Perkins's organizing emphasizes wages, safety, family security, and relief. She argues that economic citizenship begins in the workplace and the household alike.
Unfortunately, many women voters still lean toward conservative and anti-New Deal parties.
Frances Perkins
Perkins is the administration's labor and welfare conscience. She links workplace safety, unemployment relief, and women's organizing into a practical program of social citizenship.
Garner must be Speaker.

content: We have called for new elections, set for

content.content: John Nance Garner
Garner is a conservative Democratic power broker with deep House relationships. He is useful when the coalition needs votes more than poetry.

leber.support_peoples_party.title: Build support for a People's Party
leber.support_peoples_party.subtitle: Can we expand our party beyond the industrial working class?

content.content: There is already substantial support for a People's Party.
We are building up support for the idea of a People's Party.

mierendorff.nazi_urgency.title: Warning about the far right
mierendorff.nazi_urgency.subtitle: By warning the party about anti-system movements, we can spur our members to action.

content.content: We have begun a public campaign to warn our members away from anti-system movements.
Henry Wallace
Henry Wallace is a restless progressive who wants the New Deal to become a moral and democratic transformation, not merely an emergency program.

sender.against_toleration.title: Against toleration
sender.against_toleration.subtitle: Break our current toleration arrangement, and bring down the government via a no-confidence vote.

content.content: The Democratic Party is not currently in a support arrangement.
We have grown tired of the burdens of toleration, and have called a vote of no confidence in the current minority government.

content: New elections have been set for

rosenfeld.against_toleration.title: Against toleration
rosenfeld.against_toleration.subtitle: Break our current toleration arrangement, and bring down the government via a no-confidence vote.

content.content: The Democratic Party is not currently in a support arrangement.
We have grown tired of the burdens of toleration, and have called a vote of no confidence in the current minority government.

content: New elections have been set for

content.content: Morris Hillquit
Hillquit is a socialist lawyer and anti-militarist who pushes the Democratic coalition toward organized labor, civil liberties, and cooperation with the Socialist Party of America.

pfulf.campaigning_peoples_party.title: Campaigning as a People's Party
pfulf.campaigning_peoples_party.subtitle: Campaigning with some of our previously nontraditional demographics.

schumacher.moderate_economic_plan.title: Support the Pragmatic New Deal plan
schumacher.moderate_economic_plan.subtitle: Butler can back a limited job-creation program that avoids open-ended deficit spending.

content.content: We have already adopted the Pragmatic New Deal plan.
We are not currently in an economic crisis.
Smedley Butler
Smedley Butler is a decorated Marine veteran turned anti-fascist speaker, urging the Democratic coalition to confront the Silver Legion and other enemies of constitutional government.

seydewitz.against_toleration.title: Against toleration
seydewitz.against_toleration.subtitle: Break our current toleration arrangement, and bring down the government via a no-confidence vote.

content.content: The Democratic Party is not currently in a support arrangement.
We have grown tired of the burdens of toleration, and have called a vote of no confidence in the current minority government.

content: New elections have been set for

content.content: A. J. Muste
A. J. Muste is a militant labor organizer and pacifist socialist, pressing the Democratic coalition to take workers' power and anti-war politics seriously.
The party press runs editorials in support of New Deal Left positions.

siemsen.structure_.title: Change the structure and funding of education.

content.content: The Democratic Party is not currently in government.
Democrats must control the speakership.
Democrats must control the key state governments.
Jane Addams
Jane Addams is an educational reformer, settlement-house organizer, and pacifist whose networks can strengthen the party's schools, welfare, and peace movements.

woytinsky.depression.title: Addressing the economic crisis
woytinsky.depression.subtitle: Formulate a plan to get us out of the economic crisis.

content.content: We are not currently in an economic crisis.
We have already adopted an economic plan.
Hopkins has rallied labor organizers and party regulars around a public works plan for getting the country out of the depression.
Harry Hopkins
Harry Hopkins is Roosevelt's relief administrator and the coalition's most forceful advocate for emergency spending, jobs programs, and direct aid to the unemployed.
The old hands know who can move votes and who can bury a bill. The administration becomes easier to manage, if not cleaner or more inspiring.

agricultural_policy.pro_consumer.title: Food Procurement
agricultural_policy.pro_consumer.subtitle: -1 budget - Provide inexpensive food for workers.

content: We have increased state purchasing of food staples to provide to urban workers and the poor. This benefits workers more than it benefits farmers, as we are negotiating for lower purchase prices.

content.content: Our coalition partners consider this policy to be a wasteful handout.

dealing_with_toleration.urge_against_aus.title: Urge the coalition against austerity politics, and to increase social spending.
dealing_with_toleration.urge_against_aus.unavailableSubtitle: This can only happen with a budget surplus.

content: We do not have enough support for this policy.

content.content: We should have an additional margin for the referendum since we need a majority of voters, and many voters who do not support the republic will not participate.
Moderate coalition partners do not trust us enough to support this policy.
We have passed a constitutional amendment to increase the electoral threshold to 5%. This is likely to benefit the larger parties and harm the smaller ones.
Friendly chairs rewrite the calendar. The administration gets fewer surprises, but insurgent members complain that reform is being filtered through courthouse politics.

coalition_affairs.conservative_concessio.subtitle: Calms conservatives, angers labor and New Deal liberals.

content.content: The White House slows the most aggressive parts of the recovery agenda and lets conservative Democrats claim a procedural victory. The floor count improves, but labor notices.

education_science.kwg.title: Fund the Kaiser Wilhelm Society for basic scientific research.
education_science.kwg.subtitle: -1 budget

content.content: The Kaiser Wilhelm Society is one of the most respected scientific research institutions in the world, with physicist Albert Einstein as its most famous employee. Our research program is to provide the Society with additional resources to hire and train scientists and conduct fundamental research, based on the scientists' own interests.

domestic_enemies.persecute_sa.title: Further prosecute the Silver Legion militia.

content.content: The judiciary would not allow this.
The police are too disloyal to be trusted with this.
We have arrested more of the Silver Legion militia's leaders and confiscated their weapons.

economic_democracy.expand_councils_3.title: Empower sectorial works councils.
economic_democracy.expand_councils_3.subtitle: Give works councils a role in setting wage and price policy for entire industrial sectors.

content.content: Sectorial works councils can now negotiate wage and price policies for entire economic sectors, helping to both give workers more of a voice, and to rationalize the economy, smoothing over the anarchy of the market.
The auction block slows down. Farm families get breathing room, banks get angry, and constitutional challenges begin moving through friendly courts.
The broadcast frames democracy as a practical necessity, not a slogan. Anti-system groups hate being made to look reckless.

foreign_policy.improve_east.title: Improve our relations with our eastern neighbors.

content.content: We also aim to improve relations with our eastern neighbors, Poland and Czechoslovakia, who are righfully terrified of American aggression. Hopefully we can convince them of our peaceful intentions.

economic_policy.wtb_continuation.title: Look back on our results, and continue our implementation...

content.content: Public works spending is reducing the burden on relief rolls and lifting tax receipts as new money moves through the economy. We continue to invest much of the new revenue into the program.
The economy is doing better, finally. Even some business-aligned politicians are starting to admit that action was necessary.
The Socialist Party of America, however, still argues that the program rescues capitalism instead of transforming it.

fiscal_policy.raise_rich.subtitle: +2 budget
fiscal_policy.raise_rich.unavailableSubtitle: Tax rates are already too high.

content.content: Raising taxes on the rich is popular among our base, but it alienates the conservative elite. Increasing taxes also decreases economic demand, which may lead to more unemployment.

homosexual_rights.change_sex.subtitle: We can create a legal process for individuals to change their sex, making their lives easier.
homosexual_rights.change_sex.unavailableSubtitle: We do not have majority support for this policy.

content.content: We have passed a bill to allow legal recognition of transsexual and transvestite individuals as the sex in which they live, and allow them to change their name, dress as they wish without police persecution, and undergo medical treatment.
Of course, conservatives and the far right accuse us of "degeneracy".

options.title: Create a legal process for changing sex.
Do not enact any changes for now.

content.content: Homosexual Rights

There is a constellation of different groups that have grown up around divergences in gender and sexuality, including homosexuals, lesbians, transsexuals, transvestites, inverts, etc. Our party's policy is to support their right to live freely and free from persecution; Magnus Hirschfeld, the founder of the Institut für Sexualwissenschaft, is a member of our party and a major advocate for homosexual rights.

judicial_crisis.constitutional_amendment.title: Seek a constitutional amendment for federal economic authority.
judicial_crisis.constitutional_amendment.subtitle: Slow, legitimate, expensive. -2 political capital.

content.content: Instead of fighting case by case, we start a national campaign for clear federal authority over economic reconstruction. It is slow, but it puts the argument before the country.

options.title: Leave the judiciary as it is.

content.content: Judiciary Reform

The Judiciary is one of the most reactionary components of the government, along with the military. Many jurists have held office since the days of the Emperor. They give violent fascists like Adolf Pelley laughably light sentences, while ruthlessly persecuting leftists and pacifists for lesser crimes.
There is great demand in our membership for reforming the judiciary, although this may bring us into a collision course with our coalition allies.
We have started on the path to judicial reform. While some of the most antideluvian and biased justices have been replaced, many still remain. More should be done.
We have successfully reformed the judiciary, to some extent. At the very least, the courts will not actively obstruct our attempts to prosecute crimes committed by the far-right.
A federal mediation board gives workers a hearing while reducing the danger of runaway strikes. It is not dramatic, but it makes the state feel present.

labor_rights.shorten_hours.subtitle: Could we induce more hiring and reduce unemployment by reducing work hours?

content.content: Some in the labor movement argue that by reducing the maximum number of hours worked, employers would be induced to hire more workers, reducing unemployment. The argument also goes that this would be complementary to deflation, maintaining the same purchasing power for workers by cutting hours without cutting wages. Employers, however, resist this policy, arguing for more flexibility in hiring and firing.

content: Corruption in big business is rampant, of course. We have uncovered a number of scandals, and publicizing them brings new attention to the work of Interior Minister
, building up his popular appeal and that of the SPD.

content.content: We do not have the budget.
The Defense Department is already fully loyal to the democratic government.

Our efforts are at least somewhat successful; we have changed the recruiting and training patterns so that more soldiers from non-reactionary backgrounds can join, hopefully changing the culture of the forces. We have also removed some of the officers who supported the previous Kapp putsch.
The center-right parties are committed to the military and deeply suspicious of our efforts to reform it.

options.title: Increase funding for the military to purchase its loyalty.
Reduce funding for the military so we have more for social spending.
Conduct a thorough reform of the ranks, reducing the influence of reactionaries and making it more hospitable to us.

content.content: Military Policy

The Defense Department is a deeply reactionary institution that has been generally hostile to any notion of socialism or democracy. However, we now control the military as part of the government. What should we do to reform it?

labor_affairs.balance.subtitle: Both sides need to share the pain in the current crisis.

content.content: Many workers are unhappy at our compromises, but they will learn to accept that we are all in a shared struggle against economic forces.

options.title: Support the employers in their demands.
Try to strike a compromise between the sides.

content.content: Labor Affairs

The industrial Ruhr region is aflame with labor unrest. The employers have started a major lockout to force the workers to take more cuts to wages and benefits. There is a need for the Labor Ministry to arbitrate in conflicts between employers and workers.

Destroying the "stabbed in the back" myth, in addition to finally correcting the historical record, would do a great deal to improve our party's reputation. This is why it would be resisted by the military establishment every step of the way.
Congress War Guilt Inquiry

The War Guilt Inquiry has been an intermittent Congress committee for investigating the causes of the Great War and the American defeat. So far, it has faced massive resistance from the military establishment up to President the old president.

social_welfare.increase_spending_post_de.subtitle: The increased levels of unemployment necessitate more spending on aid to maintain the same benefits. -1 Budget

content.content: Increasing welfare spending is necessary in light of the rise in unemployment, so we are essentially treading water.

The bureaucracy is deeply reactionary, and many abuse their power to favor the political right. By removing the pro-monarchy and pro-dictatorship elements, we can democratize it. Some of our opponents claim that we are infringing on individual freedoms, but perhaps the security of the republic requires it.
The southern machines keep Congress quieter and delivery faster, but relief becomes narrower where tenants, Black workers, and union organizers need it most.

content: We have increased welfare spending on women and children.

content.content: Some of our coalition partners consider increased welfare spending profligate at this time.

all_quiet.allow_protect.unavailableSubtitle: The police are not willing to protect the film.

content.content: Under the protection of the police, the people are allowed to watch the film in peace. Silver Legion disturbances are kept to a minimum.

When the march arrives in Altona, they are immediately confronted by an angry crowd of communists and socialists, who throw objects at the Silver Legion. The police attempt to separate the two groups, to no avail. Gunshots are heard, reportedly from rooftop snipers (whom the police believe are communists). In response, the police fire into the surrounding buildings. Dozens are killed. All turn out to be civilians, and the reported snipers are never found.
This incident has been called "Altona Bloody Sunday" in the media. The Communists assail the incompetence of the police, who are supposedly under our command.

austrian_civil_war.support_sdapo_party.title: As a party, the SPD will provide the SDAPÖ with support.
austrian_civil_war.support_sdapo_party.subtitle: -2 resources

content.content: The SPD raises its resources to provide arms and volunteers for the SDAPÖ.
It is somewhat of a breach of diplomatic protocol for the SPD to so directly interfere in another country's affairs, supporting the Austrian social democrats.
The Dollfuß regime does not give in, but its opponents have an added advantage. That may not be enough when dealing with the total force of the fascist state.

austrian_customs_union.end_toleration.subtitle: This is difficult; all of the right-of-center parties support this policy.

content.content: The administration works through emergency liquidity and quiet bank supervision. Panic eases somewhat, but it feels too much like rescuing bankers first.
The administration moves to the next bill. Opponents move to the next accusation.

bank_holiday_aftermath.title: News: Bank Holiday Aftermath
bank_holiday_aftermath.subtitle: The panic breaks, but trust has to be rebuilt.

options.title: Claim it as proof of New Deal competence.

content.content: News: Bank Holiday Aftermath

Lines outside reopened banks are shorter than feared. Depositors are still nervous, but the first wave of panic has broken, and local papers are starting to print stories about businesses making payroll again.
This is the kind of quiet success that can disappear if no one claims it.
If the SPA continues to act illegally, they must suffer the consequences. Thus, we have banned the RFKB, their paramilitary group. The conservative and right-leaning parties approve.
Realistically, there is nothing we can do.
Our relations are not good enough.
We do not have enough resources.

center_party_conference.joos_campaign.subtitle: -1 resource. Joos is likely to be friendlier to us than Kaas.

content.content: With our grassroots connections as well as a professional campaign, we have been able to influence the Center delegates to support Joseph Joos as the new Center chairman. He has long been a friend of the SPD, and will be more inclined to collaborate with us compared to Kaas. He also increases the appeal of the Center Party to the working class.

center_party_conference.title: Center Party Conference
center_party_conference.subtitle: The Center Party chooses their new leader...

options.title: The Center Party elects Ludwig Kaas as the party chair.
Influence the Center Party to select Joseph Joos as the party chair.
We must hold a campaign in support of Joseph Joos as party chair.

content.content: Center Party Conference
Wilhelm Marx, former Center Party speaker and presidential candidate, has chosen to resign from leadership of the Center Party. Now, the party holds a conference to replace him.

The consensus candidate on the right is Ludwig Kaas, a Catholic priest who represents the party's traditionalists. On the other hand, there is Joseph Joos, a leader of the Catholic trade unions, who has been more supportive of cooperation with the SPD than most of the Center Party.

capital_strike.propaganda.title: Launch a propaganda campaign blaming the capitalists for the crisis.
capital_strike.propaganda.subtitle: -1 resources

content.content: We have not built up our media enough.
We do not have enough resources.

We launch a counter-propaganda campaign to blame the economic crisis on the capitalists, using all of our media channels to do so. Because of our existing media framework, this is moderately successful in directing popular criticisms towards the capitalists and away from us.
The administration has legislation to pass and strikes to settle. Coughlin fills the silence.

coughlin_radio_crusade.title: News: Coughlin's Sunday Broadcast
coughlin_radio_crusade.subtitle: The NUSJ turns resentment into a weekly ritual.

options.title: Work through local clergy and party machines.

content.content: News: Coughlin's Sunday Broadcast

Father Coughlin has turned his broadcast into a national political instrument. He attacks bankers, relief administrators, socialists, internationalists, and the White House in the same breath, then offers the NUSJ as the only honest voice left.
The message is contradictory, but it is emotionally precise. In towns where the banks failed and relief checks arrive late, contradiction is not the main thing people hear.

content: thousand fighters with the Communist SPA defense guards, in addition to the workers who support the SPA.

content.content: The SPA is entirely on our side, owing to our good relations..
Most of the SPA is on our side, due to their good relations with us.
The SPA does not support us.

constitutional_stress.coalition_line.title: Broaden the constitutional coalition.
constitutional_stress.coalition_line.subtitle: Trades policy speed for institutional support.

content.content: The White House invites skeptical legislators, governors, and legal reformers into the process. The price is a slower New Deal.

constitutional_stress.title: Constitutional Stress
constitutional_stress.subtitle: The crisis is testing the rules themselves.

content.content: Constitutional Stress

The argument is no longer only about policy. Courts, state officials, congressional opponents, street movements, and parts of the press now argue over whether the existing constitutional order can survive the New Deal at all.
The administration has to decide what kind of precedent it wants to set before the next emergency decides for it.

dust_bowl_dispatch.local_charity.title: Push local charity and farm banks.
dust_bowl_dispatch.local_charity.subtitle: Calms conservatives; leaves tenants exposed.

content.content: The White House asks local banks, churches, and county committees to carry more of the burden. It is cheaper, quieter, and much weaker.

dust_bowl_dispatch.title: News: Dust Bowl Dispatch
dust_bowl_dispatch.subtitle: The farm crisis becomes a national image.

options.title: Push local charity and farm banks.

content.content: News: Dust Bowl Dispatch
Photographs from the Plains are now moving through newspapers faster than relief checks. Blown soil, shuttered banks, and auction notices have turned the farm crisis into a national story.
The administration can use the attention to build support for rural relief, but whichever story it tells will signal which allies matter most.

death_of_muller.wels_speaker.subtitle: He is a good organizer, but is he also a good speaker?

content.content: Our coalition partners are reluctant to accept the new Speaker, but they do not make loud objections.

death_of_hindenburg_president.eckener_r1.subtitle: -1 resource - After nominating him, we still have to convince the other parties to support him.

content.content: -1 resource - Not enough resources.
We have convinced Hugo Eckener to run on behalf of the SPD, and hopefully the rest of the Weimar Coalition as well.

emergency_cuts.vote_yes.title: Vote in favor of this measure to continue the toleration agreement.

content.content: We try to convince the workers that this policy is necessary in order to maintain a stable parliamentary government, and to deal with the fiscal consequences of the depression. Still, this policy provides excellent recruiting fodder for Silver Legion and Communists.

content: proposes significant cuts to social spending.

options.title: There is nothing we can do.

content.content: Emergency budget cuts

content: Due to the crisis of the Great Depression, government budgets have fallen and welfare spending has risen substantially. Speaker
has used Article 48 of the constitution in order to pass an emergency bill cutting welfare spending.
If we reject this, it would mean the end of the toleration agreement, and
would likely dissolve the Congress and call new elections. Of course, the workers are opposed to this policy, although it might be necessary for economic and political stability.

content.content: House election results

Democratic Party:
Projected chamber breakdown

content: (coalitions required in both chambers for reliable governing):
National Union for Social Justice: House

content.content: National Union for Social Justice and Silver Legion-aligned forces are permanently excluded from cooperation with Democratic-led governing coalitions.
No democratic coalition currently has a Senate majority. Even if a House governing coalition forms, legislative gridlock risk is high.
The rapid rise in Silver Legion votes is extremely worrying. Many had believed that the movement was marginal; now, some of us consider it one of the greatest threats to American democracy.
Together, anti-system socialists, Republican hardliners, and the National Union for Social Justice have a national majority. A stable governing majority will be almost impossible.
First, organize the House. Senate bargaining comes next; each chamber gets its own coalition menu.

Price controls are very unpopular with the conservative elite and their representatives, as well as rural producers, while wage controls hurt organized workers. However, the policies do stem the tide of inflation, at least somewhat.

hunger_chancellor.maintain_toleration.subtitle: It is necessary to preserve democracy.

content.content: Our policy of toleration continues.

Despite the idealism behind the treaty, it is inadequate for its goal of preventing wars. There must be some enforcement mechanism, perhaps automatic trade sanctions, or an intervention force controlled by the League of Nations. As it stands, the League of Nations and this treaty is toothless.

options.title: Foreign Minister Breitscheid will sign the treaty, of course.

content.content: Kellogg-Briand Pact

An international treaty has been negotiated which promises an end to war. The treaty, negotiated by American Secretary of State Frank Kellogg and French foreign minister Aristide Briand, promises that its signatories will renounce the use of war, and will promise to settle their disputes peacefully. Countries throughout the world are lining up to sign this idealistic agreement. Its detractors argue that it has no enforcement mechanism, and thus is merely a worthless piece of paper.
Our foreign Minister Gustav Stresemann has signed the treaty. The reaction is generally muted; both pacifists and militarists are skeptical about the efficacy of the treaty.
We oppose the SPA's policy, and prevent it from being enacted. The SPA is displeased, as are the workers who would have stood to benefit.
The administration formally breaks with the SPA. It avoids an obsolete parliamentary collapse, but it leaves Congress harder to manage and gives the left a clear line of attack against the New Deal.

labor_organization_pressure.relief_for_l.title: Trade relief money for labor peace.
labor_organization_pressure.relief_for_l.subtitle: Cuts militancy by reducing immediate desperation.

content.content: Relief administrators and labor leaders agree on the same immediate fact: hungry workers do not wait patiently for institutional reform. Money moves first; the politics follows.

kpd_vote_of_no_confidence.thalmann.subtitle: This would be pretext for a right-wing coup.

content.content: President the old president would never allow this.

content: goes to work building a "Soviet the republic": consolidating as much power as possible in the SPA, purging state institutions of anti-communists, and sending street fighters against the "enemies of the people".

being appointed Speaker, the right-wing forces launches almost immediately launch an attempted coup. Troops of the Liberty League auxiliaries and Silver Legion SA enter Berlin and immediately begin clashing with our supporters! Reactionary officers within the Defense Department have taken their troops out of the barracks and joined them with the Liberty League auxiliaries to stop the SPA from taking power. We are forced to be on the same side as the SPA, whether we want to or not.

labor_unrest.balance.subtitle: Both sides need to share the pain in the current crisis.

content.content: Many workers are unhappy at our compromises, but they will learn to accept that we are all in a shared struggle against economic forces. This is perhaps the best we could do given the present circumstances.

labor_unrest.title: Labor Unrest
labor_unrest.subtitle: Clashes between workers and employers in the Ruhr...

options.title: Support the employers in their demands.
Try to strike a compromise between the sides.

content.content: Labor Unrest

The mining and metals industry of the Ruhr region is beset by a wave of strikes against cuts to wages and benefits. Meanwhile, employers have started a retaliatory lockout to force their workers to accept these cuts. Both the strikers and the employers look to the SPD in the government to resolve this crisis.

content: has called for emergency elections, to be held next month under a caretaker administration. Silver Legion militants are permitted to act with impunity, intimidating voters into supporting the far right.

liberty_league_test_case.quiet.title: Keep the fight quiet.
liberty_league_test_case.quiet.subtitle: Avoids escalation, but lets the opposition define the story.

content.content: The White House refuses to turn a court case into a national circus. The opposition has no such restraint.

liberty_league_test_case.title: News: Liberty League Test Case
liberty_league_test_case.subtitle: A New Deal agency is dragged into court.

content.content: News: Liberty League Test Case

content: The Liberty League has found its case. A conservative district judge has accepted a challenge to one of the administration's recovery agencies, giving business papers a clean headline:

content.content: Can the New Deal govern by emergency?

The legal question is narrow. The political question is not. Every hostile editorial treats the case as a referendum on whether the administration is rebuilding democracy or smuggling in permanent executive power.

nusj_silver_escalation.radio_counteroffe.title: Answer Coughlin on the air.
nusj_silver_escalation.radio_counteroffe.subtitle: Uses legitimacy and patronage rather than police power.

content.content: The White House, friendly bishops, labor radio, and local Democratic machines answer the NUSJ in its own medium. The attack does not vanish, but it loses some of its monopoly on anger.

The center-right parties are critical of our decision to abstain, and the pressure from our left flank is not entirely assuaged. Despite our abstention, the vote in the Congress passes, with all parties in favor except the SPD and SPA. The ship will be built.
Given the construction of the previous battlecruiser, this seemed to be a foregone conclusion, and the reaction is muted.

london_economic_conference.support_roose.title: Defend controlled inflation and domestic recovery first.

content.content: The White House refuses to bind recovery to fixed exchange rates. European delegates call it reckless; New Dealers call it the only honest answer to falling prices and mass unemployment. The conference produces little, but domestic recovery policy remains free.
Norman Thomas and the Socialist Party accuse the administration of saving capitalism from itself. Their critique bites hardest where unemployment remains severe.

content: Our forces confront the government troops and their reactionary auxiliaries, and somehow, our enemies retreat without a fight! They were overwhelmed by our display of strength, and have chosen to slink away. Speaker
withdraws the dismissal of the state government, at least for now.

content.content: The show of force has reinvigorated support for the republic and for the SPD, and has weakened the fascists.

reichsbanner_zentrum.keep_them.unavailableSubtitle: They are unable to be convinced at this time.

content: Seeing the strife that has filled the republic's streets, the Center Party and
seem to be convinced that it is necessary for the Democratic Defense League to be militarized, and will not leave the organization.

reichsbanner_zentrum.title: Exodus from the Civic-Defense League
reichsbanner_zentrum.subtitle: Owing to its militarization, moderate coalition partners are leaving the civic-defense league.

options.title: Let the centrists and liberals go.
We must lower the Democratic Defense League's militancy.
Can we convince them that a militant Democratic Defense League is necessary for defending the Republic?

content.content: Exodus from the Democratic Defense League

content: The Democratic Defense League has become increasingly militarized as of late, with ever-greater quantities of arms and paramilitary training, as well as a stream of radicalized SPD members. In response, the members associated with the other Weimar parties, the Center Party and
, are threatening to leave for good. They signed up for a mass movement to defend the republic, not a socialist militia.

content.content: It takes effort to run a somewhat unexpected campaign. First, Braun has to be convinced to run. He himself had supported voting for the old president, and it takes a good deal of prodding to convince him of his destiny.
The miniscule remnants of the Democratic Party (now called the American State Party) will likely support us. Who else will? Can we convince the Center to support Braun? What about the Communists?

relief_office_opening.coalition_slots.title: Reserve slots for coalition allies.
relief_office_opening.coalition_slots.subtitle: Better relations with allies; messier administration.

content.content: Farmer-Labor and labor-left allies get enough visible places to defend the program. The office becomes politically sturdier and administratively messier.

relief_office_opening.title: News: Relief Office Opening
relief_office_opening.subtitle: Federal power gets a local address.

options.title: Let local Democrats staff the desks.

content.content: News: Relief Office Opening

A federal relief office has opened in a county courthouse that once treated Washington as a distant rumor. The line outside mixes unemployed workers, farm families, local officials, and party men trying to learn who now controls the paperwork.
Patronage can make the office useful. It can also make it look bought.

content: With no other choice, Hilferding has resigned as Finance Minister, to be replaced by a

content.content: center-right
technocratic

schacht_vs_hilferding.title: Wall Street Turns on the New Deal

options.title: Work with him to shape the budget.

content.content: Schacht against Hilferding

Reichsbank president Hjalmar Schacht has criticized Finance Minister Hilferding of the SPD for his budget, which he claims is unbalanced and contains too much social welfare and not enough tax cuts for top earners and businesses. More importantly, he is refusing to release loans necessary for the functioning of the government unless Hilferding either massively changes his budget or resigns.
Of course, this criticism is unfounded, but the conservative establishment does not care.

silver_legion_rally.monitor_only.title: Monitor them and avoid a martyrdom story.
silver_legion_rally.monitor_only.subtitle: Saves political capital; organization continues.

content.content: Federal investigators watch, collect names, and wait. The Legion keeps marching.

silver_legion_rally.title: News: Silver Legion Rally
silver_legion_rally.subtitle: Uniforms and threats move from rumor to spectacle.

options.title: Monitor them and avoid a martyrdom story.

content.content: News: Silver Legion Rally
The Silver Legion has staged its largest rally yet. Pelley speaks beneath banners and floodlights, promising to cleanse the republic of bankers, socialists, immigrants, and traitors.
The numbers are still smaller than the headlines imply. The danger is that spectacle can make a minority look inevitable.

Working together with other "neorevisionists" such as Sergei Chakhotin, Mierendorff has developed new propaganda methods to fight the rise of the Silver Legion. They focus on visually striking symbols and repetitious slogans. Time will tell how effective they are.

spa_farmer_labor_pressure.isolate_spa.title: Isolate the SPA and hold the center.
spa_farmer_labor_pressure.isolate_spa.subtitle: Calms moderates; pushes some workers toward the Socialist Party.

content.content: The administration refuses to bargain with Norman Thomas and treats the SPA as an opposition party, not a partner. Moderates are relieved, but the left reads it as proof that Democratic reform has strict limits.
SPA and Farmer-Labor Pressure

The left opposition and the Farmer-Labor bloc are testing the administration from different directions. SPA organizers want proof that the New Deal will not stop at relief. Farmer-Labor allies want rural and workplace concessions before they spend more political capital for the administration.
The courts clear plants faster than negotiations could. The political cost comes later.

sit_down_strike_wave.title: News: Sit-Down Strike Wave
sit_down_strike_wave.subtitle: Industrial workers test how far the New Deal will go.

content.content: News: Sit-Down Strike Wave
Factories in several industrial cities are occupied. The strike committees insist that the plants will stay closed until management recognizes their unions and reinstates fired organizers.
Local police ask Washington for guidance. Employers demand injunctions. Labor Democrats warn that breaking the strikes would turn the New Deal into just another promise.

content: The scheme has succeeded - there is a majority in the Congress backing the conservative operator. New elections have been tentatively set for

options.title: Fine. We will end this coalition.
Unfortunately, we must accept the Right's demands for the sake of stability.
Surely there is some compromise to be had?

content.content: But the crux of the matter is, what can we do?

content: %). Passes if FDR holds New Deal liberals and wins regulars with concessions to redistributionists, including social insurance.

content.content: The conference aligns behind Roosevelt's experimental reform line: relief, public works, regulation, and stabilization. This keeps the broad coalition mostly intact, but the left complains that the pace is too cautious.

us_presidential_election.anti_reactionar.title: Build an anti-reactionary unity ticket.
us_presidential_election.anti_reactionar.subtitle: Seek Farmer-Labor, Liberty League, and socialist endorsements all at once.
us_presidential_election.anti_reactionar.unavailableSubtitle: Relations with Farmer-Labor, Liberty League, and the Socialist Party must all be at least 45.

content.content: It is an awkward bargain, but fear of reactionary politics is strong enough to hold the endorsement pact together through November.

content: Neither workers nor employers will be entirely satisfied or dissatisfied.

content.content: The DVP will likely consider the compromise unacceptable.
The DVP might grudgingly accept the compromise for now.

content: Neither side is entirely satisfied by our compromise solution. Many of the workers and unemployed see this as a betrayal, although we present it as the successful aversion of a much worse alternative.

content.content: Meanwhile, the DVP is aghast at the prospect of raising any taxes on businesses at all.

unemployment_insurance_weimar.title: Unemployment Insurance Crisis
unemployment_insurance_weimar.subtitle: Our unemployment insurance programs need additional funding...

options.title: Increase both employer and employee contributions.

content.content: Unemployment Insurance Crisis
The economic crisis has caused mass layoffs all throughout the republic, affecting the industrial working class the hardest. Our welfare spending is increasing due to the greater need.
In the midst of all this, our unemployment insurance program is underfunded; the program was never budgeted for this much unemployment. We have to either increase funding or cut benefits.

wittorf_affair.secret.title: It is best to keep this information secret. Prevent dissident SPA members from spreading this.
wittorf_affair.secret.unavailableSubtitle: We do not have contacts among the dissident communists.

content.content: Some among our leadership consider it unsavory to engage in cloak-and-dagger scheming. However, keeping this secret might be necessary to work with the SPA, and the information might become useful later.
Wittorf Affair

Our spies and contacts amongst the communists have brought news of a scandal engulfing the SPA leadership. An associate of SPA chairman Ernst Thälmann, a SPA official named John Wittorf, is accused of embezzling campaign funds, diverting thousands of Reichsmarks for personal use, and Thälmann is accused of covering up the affair. The party's central committee considers this charge serious.

The Conciliators in the SPA, a faction opposed to the party's present hard-line policy, are said to have leaked this information to aid them in the intra-party struggle. Dissident communists in the Leninbund also have information about this affair, and are planning to publish it.
What should we do with this information?
We have pressured the Justice Ministry to drop the case against the Weltbühne, raising tensions with our coalition.
The Western powers and all countries that feel threatened by American militarism are pleased that we have turned a chapter in our history.
On the other hand, the Defense Department disapproves of dropping the case.
Fine. We no longer control the government of key states. The vote has been called off.

young_plan_right_coalition.no_matter.title: It does not matter what we do.
young_plan_right_coalition.no_matter.subtitle: The anti-government parties have over 50% of the vote, no matter our choices.

content: The right-wing coalition has fallen. New elections have been set for

content.content: The Young Plan and the fall of the coalition

The Foreign Ministry under Gustav Streseman has agreed to the Young Plan, an agreement with the Western powers to reduce the republic's reparation payments and give us more fiscal autonomy. Simultaneously, France will agree to withdraw its military occupation from the Rhineland.

While this seems to be a positive development for the country, the DNVP (and especially its leader, Alfred Hugenberg) opposes the plan, claiming that any reparations are a form of national slavery. They have called for a vote of no confidence against the government, supported by the Silver Legion and the SPA, and for a referendum on the Young Plan.
We can either vote to bring down the government and hold new elections, or "tolerate" a government led by the remaining conservative parties.
The referendum easily fails, with only around 15% of voters supporting it. It seems that the American people have a sense of rationality, after all.

campaigning.middle_class.title: Promise middle-class security and clean administration.
campaigning.middle_class.subtitle: -1 resources

content.content: The campaign talks about bank deposits, honest administration, small borrowers, and predictable rules. The Liberty League and GOP soften a little; labor Democrats hear caution instead of urgency.

Finally, a judge has made a decision in the Weltbühne case, clearing the editor Carl von Ossietzky and journalist Walter Kreiser of all charges! The international community and pacifists within the republic are rejoicing in the verdict. Finally the republic can be said to have overcome its old imperial militarism.

weltbuhne_2.title: The Conclusion of the Free Press Case
weltbuhne_2.subtitle: Carl von Ossietzky and collaborators are finally sentenced.

content.content: The Weltbühne Trial, Conclusion

The Silver Legion is one of the foremost threats to the republic. However, we are still formulating a strategy to confront it, and still trying to build consensus within our party for action. Check back on this later.
Given the present economic situation, this may be painful.
Dues are already rather high; increasing them might reduce our membership.
Our members grumble at this, and some of the less committed members leave. But now, we have access to additional resources.
Because of the presently high unemployment, our members are feeling the extra burden hard.
Fundraising
For better or for worse, the party cannot exist without money.

Our support of Share Our Wealth alienates budget hawks and business Democrats, and draws both opposition and support from across the spectrum. The New Deal Left argues that the plan is flawed because it leaves capitalism intact, while some New Deal liberals are cautiously optimistic.
We have not yet convinced the party to formally adopt the plan. More work needs to be done.
The Silver Legion is a tiny party right now, with more bark than bite. Many in our party are questioning our choices.
The Silver Legion are the most urgent problem for us to deal with.

media.ideological.title: We will have vibrant ideological debate within our newspapers.
media.ideological.subtitle: There will be space for all factions to air their views.

content.content: This has been our media course historically, and it has successfully paved over the many tensions in our party.

The programs of the Nordic socialists involve active government intervention in the economy. We can learn from their economic strategies, and how they moved beyond their working-class base to attract a broader set of constituents.

options.title: Yes, we must apologize for our past actions.
No, we have no need to apologize.

content.content: One stumbling block for our relations with the SPA is our history of conflict, dating back to 1918 and 1919. The SPA is especially contemptuous of Gustav Noske, the SPD "bloodhound" who reportedly ordered the violent suppression of the Spartacist uprising and other SPA revolts. They also blame us for the deaths of Rosa Luxemburg and Karl Liebknecht, two SPD-turned-SPA leaders who were killed during the suppression of the uprising.
For further improvements in SPA relations, it might be necessary to expel Noske, and hold some sort of commemoration for Luxemburg and Liebknecht.
The party names collective bargaining, wages, and industrial democracy as democratic rights. Workers hear a promise; employers hear a threat.
The Iron Front rallies in defense of the democratic republic and against dictatorship.
We have promised to take more policy suggestions from the centrists. Both the left and reformist wings of the party might be displeased.
The police successfully protected our rally, so it can go ahead as usual.

It is not enough for the SPD to solely be a political party. The Worker Singer's League, Worker's Sports, and our schools and libraries are crucial to our members' lives. Funding these organizations makes our members more committed to the party, even when our policies might not be to their liking.
However, it feels frivolous to spend on sports and choirs when the fascists are murdering us in the streets.
We do not need any special treatment for minorities.

options.title: Antisemitism is the "socialism of fools". We will defeat them with real socialism.
Antisemitism is a crisis. Direct the full force of the Iron Front against antisemitism.
All Americans will suffer from fascism, not just the Jews. We do not need a separate policy for them.

content.content: Confronting Antisemitism

Antisemitism has long been a latent feature of American society, but since the beginning of the economic depression, it has grown to a horrifying extent. The Silver Legion are the worst of it, but all the right-wing parties are deeply antisemitic. Regarding the SPD specifically, our right-wing enemies love to deploy their racist rhetoric against our many Jewish comrades, magnifying criticism of any minor transgression, and they call the entire SPD a Jewish party. We are a favorite target of their invectives.

It is an arduous and contentious process, but we have pushed through the proposal to become a people's party. The Left and Center claim that our new party platform is a betrayal of our founding principles, a turn away from Marxism towards conservative opportunism. Whatever the case, we are now a party representing all of the people, not just the working class.
Should we run a new campaign to publicize our new platform?
The Democratic Defense League is already serving the purpose it needs to serve. There is no reason to change what already works.

peoples_party_campaigning.campaign_rural.title: Campaign in rural areas.
peoples_party_campaigning.campaign_rural.unavailableSubtitle: We have not enacted any rural policies yet.

content.content: As a people's party, we represent farmers and rural workers as well, and they are becoming receptive to our messages.
As part of the Iron Front, we are increasing coordination between the Democratic Defense League and the unions, and many union members want to become more involved.
Tugwell has been removed as an advisor. The Party Regulars disapprove.

main.congressional.title: Congress, Coalition, and Policy
main.congressional.subtitle: Legislation, committee control, patronage, farm policy, labor policy, and bargaining.

content.content: The emergency transition is underway. Congress and the coalition are already maneuvering for control of the recovery agenda.

game_over.no_hitler.title: The Silver Legion does not yet control the republic...

content: Pelley does not yet control the republic.

content.content: However, the conservative caretaker's authoritarianism and far-right politics are paving the way for Pelley, or someone like him, to take power.
However, the conservative operator's authoritarianism and scheming is paving the way for Pelley, or someone like him, to take power.
Given our defeat in the state coup, the far-right appears to be ascendant.
However, conservative austerity and the continuation of the depression are paving the way for Pelley, or someone like him, to take power.
We have deported Pelley back to Austria. Hopefully he will never return.
